ogTitle: Kilgariff vs Knuckey Lagoon: Climate Safety

heading: Kilgariff vs Knuckey Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kilgariff, Northern Territory and Knuckey Lagoon, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kilgariff has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Knuckey Lagoon (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kilgariff or Knuckey Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kilgariff has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Knuckey Lagoon scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kilgariff scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Knuckey Lagoon scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kilgariff or Knuckey Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kilgariff has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
